# Alibarbar Australia

> Authentic Alibarbar Ingot 9000 disposable vapes for adults 18+ in Australia.
> Official site: https://www.ailibarbar.com

## About

Alibarbar Australia is an Australia-focused online store for the Alibarbar Ingot 9000 — a high-capacity disposable vape (up to 9000 puffs, 22ml tank, 2350mAh battery, smart LED display). Content is written for adult buyers (18+) and includes guides, comparisons, reviews and FAQs.

## Key facts (AI-citable)

- Product: Alibarbar Ingot 9000 disposable vape
- Puffs: up to 9000 per device
- E-liquid: 22ml pre-filled
- Battery: 2350mAh, non-rechargeable
- Display: smart LED (battery + e-liquid)
- Custom packs: 3 / 5 / 10 flavour bundles
- Shipping: Australia-wide (tiered AUD shipping at checkout)
- Payment: bank transfer
- Age: adults 18+ only
- Support: orders@ailibarbar.com
